texto: You’ve heard poets talk about, poems flowing out of their bodies; painters, they get on a roll. You all have seen the musician, when they are in that state, the guitar, the piano, whatever instrument just becomes part of their body, their ego is completely gone and it is just their connection to the art, their connection to the emotions they are trying to share with the audience- that is pure flow.
explicacao: Citação de Chase Jarvis sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “You’ve heard poets talk about, poems flowing out of their bodies; painters, they get on a roll. Y…” articula familia, creativity, flow em registro de familia, com relevância para contextos como flow.
